narrative: Healthcare's single-day gain of 3.0 percent places it among the stronger defensive moves of recent weeks, and combined with real estate adding 1.5 percent today, the rotation out of technology and China-exposed equities is now reinforcing itself across both the five-day and one-day timeframes rather than fading. FXI has shed nearly 6 percent over the past five sessions and extended that loss by another 2.1 percent today, making China the most consistent source of pressure in an otherwise composed market. Watch whether FXI stabilises or breaks to a fresh five-day low, as a continuation would test whether the defensive rotation remains contained or begins to pull broader EM sentiment with it.
